current_state: Three direct publisher-originating notice-text exemplars now exist: two Springer surfaces (journal article and book/chapter) plus one archive-resolved NEJM retraction notice.
publication_use_now: Use as a bounded three-row top-depth slice for Table 1E, source-depth ladders, and methods/results prose showing direct-notice breadth across publisher families and venue types without claiming broad balance.
next_threshold_event: One direct SAGE journal or publisher notice with public text, or another non-archived cross-publisher scholarly action record.
why_it_matters: This is the cleanest remaining sf13 route for moving from a reviewer-usable but archive-sensitive top-depth trio toward stronger live/direct balance across publishers.
false_progress_to_avoid: Do not treat archive-resolved notice text as proof of live-page openness, and do not promote another Springer-adjacent companion page, DOI metadata echo, or specialist report into a new cross-publisher direct-notice gain.
paper_thesis_use: Table 1E top-depth slice; research-integrity source-depth panel; limitations paragraph on archive-versus-live and mediated-versus-direct asymmetry.
dashboard_hook: publisher-notice upgrade funnel; archive-versus-live facet; venue-type-versus-publisher-diversity badge

current_state: Public Wayback captures now expose direct NEJM retraction-notice text and the original-page RETRACTED banner even though the live DOI-to-publisher route remains blocked from this lane.
publication_use_now: Use as an archive-resolved direct-notice class that upgrades a formerly blocked non-Springer row without pretending that the live page is presently open.
next_threshold_event: One live reachable NEJM publisher notice page, or another equally authoritative non-archived clinical/journal action record with public direct text.
why_it_matters: This row now proves that archive-resolved publisher text can diversify top depth and should travel separately from still-mediated or still-blocked rows.
false_progress_to_avoid: Do not restate archive availability as live-page openness, and do not infer broader clinical significance, misconduct, or publisher practice from this one notice pair.
paper_thesis_use: Methods/results note on archive-resolved notice recovery; reviewer-safe non-Springer exemplar; thesis note on blocked-versus-archived scholarly evidence.
dashboard_hook: blocked-versus-archived route facet; publisher-diversity frontier panel

current_state: Crossref article identity is verified and a named editor is quoted publicly, but the SAGE journal/publisher notice page is still not directly captured.
publication_use_now: Use as a mediated-statement class that supports article identification, correction-status metadata, and attributed editorial language only.
next_threshold_event: One direct SAGE journal correction, retraction, or publisher notice tied to the verified DOI.
why_it_matters: This is now the cleanest live non-archived sf13 route for upgrading from mediated statement to direct notice without changing the underlying phenomenon class.
false_progress_to_avoid: Do not promote the named editor quote or Crossref metadata into final editorial action or reason-bearing direct notice text.
paper_thesis_use: Source-depth ladder mid-tier; methods/results explanation of mediated versus direct publisher evidence.

current_state: Three rows remain below DOI/direct-notice grade: one has strong non-official direct text plus official probe logs, and two remain specialist-report-only research-integrity leads.
publication_use_now: Keep as clearly separated lower-depth rows for comparator, discovery, residual-queue, and source-resolution-friction writing only.
next_threshold_event: Any canonical direct publisher, platform-action, institutional-investigation, or official-process record that upgrades one row out of the weak-source bucket.
why_it_matters: This bucket explains why sf13 is already reusable for limitations/methods without pretending every row is near direct-notice grade.
false_progress_to_avoid: Do not merge broadcaster/officer-probe evidence, specialist reporting, and platform-gated discovery into one generic evidence class or imply sanction/finality.
paper_thesis_use: Lower-depth queue layer for Table 1E and source-family limitations prose.
